Figure 3. Architecture of proposed TexADiff. During training, the extracted RTDM is combined with the LR input and noisy latent via a MiniControlNet to form conditioning signals, while also modulating the training objective in a texture-aware manner. At inference time, since the HR image is unavailable, the RTDM is predicted by an RTDM prediction network.
